nodes.name: 尼加拉瓜
nodes.summary: 尼加拉瓜是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括山冠雉、Yucatan bobwhite、Spot-bellied bobwhite等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scrub euphonia
nodes.summary: Scrub euphonia（Scrub euphonia，学名 Euphonia affinis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the east from Mexico's Yucatán Peninsula south through Belize and Guatemala into the western half of Honduras

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the west it is found from western Oaxaca in southwestern Mexico south along the Pacific slope through Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Nicaragua into northwestern Costa Rica as far as the Tárcoles District in Puntarenas Province. The scrub euphonia inhabits several somewhat open landscapes in the tropical zone
